# 🧠 HeadyMe

**Self-aware, self-correcting intelligence infrastructure.**

HeadyMe builds autonomous AI systems that operate as a fully automated digital company.
20+ specialized agents orchestrate code, research, operations, creative, and personal assistance.

## Ecosystem

| Product | Description |
|---|---|
| **HeadySystems** | The architecture of intelligence — API gateway, brain orchestration, edge proxy |
| **HeadyConnection** | AI for everyone — nonprofit bringing tools to underserved communities |
| **HeadyBuddy** | Personal AI assistant with persistent memory |
| **HeadyMCP** | Model Context Protocol gateway |
| **HeadyIO** | Developer platform — APIs, SDKs, sandbox |
